errors.rateLimited: Rate limit exceeded. You have sent too many requests in {{after}}. Please wait before retrying.
errors.noValidPayment: Transaction does not contain a valid payment
errors.onlyParticipants: Only trade participants can dispute a trade
errors.notParticipant: Not a participant of this trade
errors.chatOnlyWhileLocked: Chat is only available while trade is locked
errors.invalidCoordinates: Invalid numeric coordinates or radius supplied
errors.precisionRange: Precision must be an integer between 4 and 8
errors.nameLatLngRequired: Name, lat (number), and lng (number) are required
errors.registrationLimit: Registration limit exceeded for this network or device
errors.contactInfoRequired: Contact info is required when notification type is specified
errors.invalidEmail: Invalid email address format for contact info
errors.invalidPhone: Invalid phone number format for contact info
errors.secretOrSignedXdrRequired: Either secret or signed_xdr is required
errors.locationRevealedOnlyAfterMatch: Location is revealed only after a match is confirmed (escrow locked)
errors.noProviderForTrade: No registered provider for this trade

instructions.showQR: Show this QR to the cash provider to receive your cash.
instructions.signAndSubmit: Sign the transaction with your wallet and submit to the provided endpoint.

notifications.claimUpdate: Velo claim update: Your claim {{id}} for {{amount}} XLM/USDC has been {{status}}.

privacy.note: Locations are generalized to a geohash cell; exact coordinates are revealed only to a confirmed match.

discovery.noProvidersNearby: Velo is not available in this area yet because there are no approved cash providers nearby. Check back later.
